Title: Setup Spring Boot backend skeleton
Body: Create modular monolith backend structure under autowash-backend with base bootstrapping, PostgreSQL config, and Swagger/OpenAPI setup.

Title: Setup Next.js frontend skeleton
Body: Create base Next.js App Router structure under autowash-frontend by using the prototype as the frontend base and preparing customer, operations, and admin workspaces.

Title: Implement backend auth module endpoints
Body: Implement register, OTP send/verify, login, refresh, logout, JWT, RBAC, and default MEMBER tier on registration.
Dependencies: Huy phải xong: Setup Spring Boot backend skeleton

Title: Build customer auth integration
Body: Implement customer register, verify OTP, login, refresh handling, logout, and role redirect against real auth APIs.
Dependencies: Khương phải xong: Setup Next.js frontend skeleton; Huy phải xong: Implement backend auth module endpoints hoặc Swagger contract

Title: Implement backend user profile API
Body: Create profile and preferences APIs used immediately after login.
Dependencies: Huy phải xong: Implement backend auth module endpoints

Title: Build customer profile page integration
Body: Wire profile page against backend profile and preferences APIs.
Dependencies: Khương phải xong: Setup Next.js frontend skeleton; Huy phải xong: Implement backend user profile API; Hùng phải xong: Build customer auth integration

Title: Implement backend vehicle CRUD APIs
Body: Create vehicle create, list, detail, update, delete, and set-primary endpoints with Swagger docs.
Dependencies: Huy phải xong: Implement backend auth module endpoints

Title: Build customer vehicle CRUD pages
Body: Implement vehicle list, add, detail, edit, delete, and set-primary flows using prototype UI and real APIs.
Dependencies: Khương phải xong: Setup Next.js frontend skeleton; Huy phải xong: Implement backend vehicle CRUD APIs; Hùng phải xong: Build customer auth integration

Title: Implement backend booking APIs
Body: Create package/add-on/combo/voucher list APIs, booking create/list/detail/cancel, voucher validate, and booking status model.
Dependencies: Huy phải xong: Implement backend auth module endpoints và Implement backend vehicle CRUD APIs

Title: Build customer booking checkout flow
Body: Implement 7-step checkout, voucher validation, booking success, booking list, and booking detail using prototype UI and real APIs.
Dependencies: Khương phải xong: Setup Next.js frontend skeleton; Huy phải xong: Implement backend booking APIs; Hùng phải xong: Build customer vehicle CRUD pages

Title: Implement backend operations lifecycle APIs
Body: Create wash session create, queue, check-in, start, complete, and booking status synchronization.
Dependencies: Huy phải xong: Implement backend booking APIs

Title: Build staff operations queue and session flow
Body: Implement queue board, check-in, fee or projected points display, start wash, and complete wash.
Dependencies: Khương phải xong: Setup Next.js frontend skeleton; Thuận phải xong: Implement backend operations lifecycle APIs

Title: Implement backend loyalty APIs
Body: Create loyalty earn, redeem, history, account, and tier upgrade rules triggered from complete wash.
Dependencies: Thuận phải xong: Implement backend operations lifecycle APIs; Huy phải xong: Implement backend booking APIs

Title: Build customer history
Priority: Implement booking history, wash history, loyalty balance, tier, point transaction history, earned points visibility after complete wash, and available promotions filtered by active promotion/tier targeting.
column15: Khương phải xong: Setup Next.js frontend skeleton; Thuận phải xong: Implement backend loyalty APIs và Implement backend promotions CRUD; Hùng phải xong: Build customer booking checkout flow

Title: Implement backend promotions CRUD
Body: Create promotions CRUD with targeting for all tiers or selected tier groups.
Dependencies: Thuận phải xong: Implement backend loyalty APIs

Title: Build admin promotions management pages
Body: Implement admin promotions CRUD pages and customer promotions list page.
Dependencies: Khương phải xong: Setup Next.js frontend skeleton; Thuận phải xong: Implement backend promotions CRUD

Title: Implement backend admin bookings and customer history APIs
Body: Create all bookings view, customer detail, wash history, and point transaction history APIs.
Dependencies: Huy phải xong: Implement backend booking APIs; Thuận phải xong: Implement backend operations lifecycle APIs và Implement backend loyalty APIs

Title: Build admin bookings and customer history pages
Body: Implement admin all bookings, customer detail tabs, and point transaction history views.
Dependencies: Khương phải xong: Setup Next.js frontend skeleton; Thuận phải xong: Implement backend admin bookings and customer history APIs; Hưng phải xong: Build staff operations queue and session flow

Title: Run foundation demo QA pass
Body: Validate register -> vehicle -> booking -> operations -> loyalty -> admin oversight flow against Swagger and UI.
Dependencies: Huy phải xong: auth/profile/vehicle/booking APIs; Thuận phải xong: operations/loyalty/promotion/admin APIs; Hùng phải xong: customer integration; Hưng phải xong: staff/admin integration; Khương phải xong: frontend base and UI pass
